privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic medication safety Root Cause Analysis (RCA) incident. The incident ID is RCA-2024-0847, involving a 10x Heparin overdose that occurred on October 14, 2024. The patient suffered temporary coagulation abnormality but was successfully reversed with protamine with no permanent harm. Contributing factors span six categories: People/Staff (4 factors including nurse fatigue and failure to verify), Process/Procedures (4 factors including BCMA bypass and lack of time-out), Equipment/Technology (3 factors including smart pump guardrail misconfiguration), Environment (4 factors including poor lighting and interruptions), Materials/Medication (4 factors including LASA confusion and labeling issues), and Management/Policy (4 factors including staffing ratios exceeding safe levels and lack of reporting culture). The skeleton fishbone diagram contains approximately 17 shapes; populating it with all 23+ contributing factors from the incident report will yield 35+ total shapes.
